description_long: This SUV features a robust, boxy design with a dark blue body accented by numerous gold trim elements, giving it a luxurious and somewhat vintage appearance. The vehicle is equipped with prominent gold side mirrors, roof fixtures, and ornate lamp-like structures on the front and rear corners, suggesting a custom or ceremonial style. The roof is flat and metallic, with visible bolts and a spare tire mounted on the rear door. The windows are tinted, and the doors have gold handles and trim, enhancing the opulent look. The front grille and bumper are heavily adorned with gold, and the headlights are encased in decorative housings. The wheels are black with gold accents, and the overall build suggests a sturdy, high-end urban vehicle.
description: A boxy, dark blue SUV with extensive gold trim, ornate lamp-like fixtures, and a luxurious, vintage-inspired design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the gold-trimmed doors, ornate side mirrors, and decorative roof fixtures.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the gold-adorned grille, bumper, and lamp-like headlight housings.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with similar gold detailing and visible door handles, mirrors, and roof features.
description_view_3: Rear view displaying the flat metallic roof, spare tire, and gold-accented rear lamps and bumper.
attribute_wheel_design: black wheels with gold accents, multi-spoke design
